zh.lifeSummary: 當Margareta Warman於1535年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，她的父親Edmund Warman20歲，母親Frances Spring17歲。她於大約1550年與John Thurston在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1583年6月27日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維德莫享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margareta Warman于1535年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，她的父亲Edmund Warman20岁，母亲Frances Spring17岁。她于大约1550年与John Thurston在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1583年6月27日在英国英格兰薩默塞特維德莫享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Warman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a merchant or trader, from Middle English ware-man ‘market trader’ (Old English waru ‘articles of merchandise, wares’ + mann ‘man’).
English: from the Middle English personal name Warmund (Old English Wǣrmund, from wǣr ‘agreement, treaty’ + mund ‘protection’).
Jewish (Ashkenazic): probably an artificial name from German wahr ‘true’ or warm ‘warm’ + Mann ‘man’.

variants.name: Worman
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Warman  .

nameMeanings.name: Margareta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margrethe
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margareta Warman was born in 1535, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edmund Warman, was 20 and her mother, Frances Spring, was 17. She married John Thurston about 1550, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 27 June 1583, in Wedmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margareta Warman est née en 1535, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund Warman, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Frances Spring, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John Thurston environ 1550, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 juin 1583, à Wedmore, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margareta Warman 1535 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Warman 20 und ihre Mutter Frances Spring 17. Sie hat um 1550 in England, United Kingdom John Thurston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Juni 1583 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Wedmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margareta Warman è nata il nel 1535 nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Edmund Warman, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Frances Spring, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato John Thurston circa 1550, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 27 giugno 1583, nel Wedmore, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margareta Warmanが1535年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Edmund Warmanは20歳，母Frances Springは17歳であった。約1550年にイギリスイギリスでJohn Thurstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1583年6月27日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウエドモーで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margareta Warman(이)가 1535년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Warman(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Frances Spring(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1550년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John Thurston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1583년 6월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 w드모어에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margareta Warman nasceu em 1535, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edmund Warman, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Frances Spring, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com John Thurston aproximadamente 1550, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de junho de 1583, em Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margareta Warman родилась в 1535 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edmund Warman было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Frances Spring, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Thurston около 1550 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 27 июня 1583 г. в местности ведмор, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margareta Warman nació en 1535, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edmund Warman, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Frances Spring, tenía 17 años. Se casó con John Thurston aproximadamente 1550, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 27 de junio de 1583, en Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
